channel.title: Comments on: bbPress will be a WordPress Plugin

item.title: By: Peter Box
item.dc:creator: Peter Box
item.description: Frankly though, I did not like BB press too much. I would always suggest people to take a look at Vanilla forum also. One example is slicehost forums. They look way neater.
item.content:encoded: Frankly though, I did not like BB press too much. I would always suggest people to take a look at Vanilla forum also. One example is slicehost forums. They look way neater.

item.title: By: Daniel Juhl Mogensen
item.dc:creator: Daniel Juhl Mogensen
item.description: I don't really know what to think about this.. I liked the idea of bbPress being a standalone software package, which could be integrated into already existing websites, portals and more, which doesn't use WordPress. After this change, all these will have to install WordPress, right?
item.content:encoded: I don’t really know what to think about this.. I liked the idea of bbPress being a standalone software package, which could be integrated into already existing websites, portals and more, which doesn’t use WordPress. After this change, all these will have to install WordPress, right?

item.title: By: Gautam
item.dc:creator: Gautam
item.description:
In reply to <a href="/bbpress-will-be-a-wordpress-plugin/#comment-1106">Daniel Juhl Mogensen</a>.
Yup, you'll have to install WordPress first and then bbPress (which will be a canonical plugin). It wouldn't matter a lot as now plugin can be installed in a few clicks.
item.content:encoded:
In reply to Daniel Juhl Mogensen.

Yup, you’ll have to install WordPress first and then bbPress (which will be a canonical plugin). It wouldn’t matter a lot as now plugin can be installed in a few clicks.

item.title: By: Dave Holowiski
item.dc:creator: Dave Holowiski
item.description: That's really great to hear. I've been holding off on putting up a forum on my site because I don't want to have 2 software packages to maintain (Wordpress and forum software) so it will be really nice when it is a plugin. I'm looking forward to Canonical plugins too, and it will be great to see bbpress as a canonical plugin. So many fun things coming up in 2010 for WordPress!
item.content:encoded:
That’s really great to hear. I’ve been holding off on putting up a forum on my site because I don’t want to have 2 software packages to maintain (WordPress and forum software) so it will be really nice when it is a plugin.
I’m looking forward to Canonical plugins too, and it will be great to see bbpress as a canonical plugin.
So many fun things coming up in 2010 for WordPress!
